overview: Valor Wellness provides personalized wellness care with advanced treatments for muscle tone, weight loss, hormone support, and aesthetics. The clinic operates in-person locations in Missouri and New Mexico, and provides online consultations nationwide.
highlights: EMSculpt NEO for muscle toning and core strengthening
Emsella for pelvic floor strengthening (FDA-cleared, no downtime)
targetAudience: Adults pursuing longevity, muscle health, weight loss, and aesthetic improvements through personalized wellness treatments.
